---
title: Slides with reveal.js
resources:
  - slides/example_slides.qmd
  - slides/advanced_slides.qmd
---

Quarto can also render to [revealjs](https://revealjs.com/) a powerful and convenient presentation format. 
Slides can make use of all the other features of Quarto, such as inclusion of code, widgets etc. 

## Examples

### Example slides

This example shows a minimal set of slides.     

[Open slides in a new tab](slides/example_slides.html)

:::: {.panel-tabset}

## Slides

```{=html}
<iframe
  class="slide-deck"
  src="slides/example_slides.html"
  title="Example RevealJS slide deck"
  width="100%"
  height="600px"
  allowfullscreen>
</iframe>
``` 
## Slide `.qmd`

````{python}
#| eval: false
{{< include slides/example_slides.qmd >}}
````

::::


### Advanced slides

This example shows a less minimal deck with fragments, columns, callouts, math, Mermaid diagrams, speaker notes, vertical slides, and executed Python cells.

[Open slides in a new tab](slides/advanced_slides.html)

:::: {.panel-tabset}

## Slides

```{=html}
<iframe
  class="slide-deck"
  src="slides/advanced_slides.html"
  title="Advanced RevealJS slide deck"
  width="100%"
  height="600px"
  allowfullscreen>
</iframe>
```

## Slide `.qmd`

````{python}
#| eval: false
{{< include slides/advanced_slides.qmd >}}
````

::::

## Technical details
